buffs.name: Agile
buffs.description: Creatures with Agile have an additional, independent chance to dodge attacks.

buffs.name: Arcane
buffs.description: When an Arcane creature casts a spell, the spell does not consume any Charges. Then, this buff is removed.

buffs.name: Barrier
buffs.description: Barrier absorbs a certain amount of damage. After the maximum amount of damage is dealt, the buff is removed.

buffs.name: Defensive
buffs.description: Creatures with Defensive automatically Defend at the end of their turn.

buffs.name: Immune
buffs.description: Creatures with Immune can't be afflicted with debuffs.

buffs.name: Invisible
buffs.description: Invisible creatures cannot be targeted by enemy attacks or spells. This buff is removed after the creature takes an action.

buffs.name: Leeching
buffs.description: Creatures with Leeching recover health equal to 25% of the damage they deal.

buffs.name: Mending
buffs.description: Creatures with Mending recover 25% health at the start of their turn.

buffs.name: Proficient
buffs.description: Proficient creatures gain 30% more benefits from their Artifact's Stat Slots.

buffs.name: Protected
buffs.description: Creatures with Protected take 50% less damage.

buffs.name: Rebirth
buffs.description: Creatures with Rebirth are resurrected with 50% health when they die.

buffs.name: Repelling
buffs.description: Repelling creatures have a 50% chance to ignore damage from spells.

buffs.name: Savage
buffs.description: Savage creatures have an additional, independent chance to deal critical damage with attacks.

buffs.name: Shelled
buffs.description: Shelled negates the next incoming attack or spell.

buffs.name: Splashing
buffs.description: Creatures with Splashing deal 100% of their damage to enemies adjacent to the target they attack.

buffs.name: Taunting
buffs.description: Creatures with Taunting automatically provoke at the end of their turn.

buffs.name: Warded
buffs.description: Creatures with Warded cannot lose stats.

debuffs.name: Bleeding
debuffs.description: Creatures with Bleeding take damage equal to 30% of their current health at the start of each turn.

debuffs.name: Blighted
debuffs.description: Creatures with Blighted cannot be healed and take damage from healing effects equal to 50% of the effect.

debuffs.name: Blind
debuffs.description: Blind creatures cannot choose their targets when attacking or casting single-target spells.

debuffs.name: Bomb
debuffs.description: At the start of a creature's turn, its Bomb detonates, dealing damage equal to 80% of the afflictor's Speed and then is removed.

debuffs.name: Burning
debuffs.description: Creatures with Burning take damage based on the inflictor’s Intelligence each turn.

debuffs.name: Confused
debuffs.description: Confused creatures have a 50% chance to attack or cast harmful spells on their allies.

debuffs.name: Cursed
debuffs.description: When creatures with Cursed deal damage with attacks or spells, they take damage equal to 100% of their target's Attack.

debuffs.name: Disarmed
debuffs.description: Disarmed creatures lose all benefits from their equipped Artifact (except Health).

debuffs.name: Feared
debuffs.description: Feared creatures cannot gain stats.

debuffs.name: Frozen
debuffs.description: Frozen creatures cannot act until they thaw; chance to thaw increases each turn.

debuffs.name: Inverted
debuffs.description: Inverted creatures heal enemies instead of damaging them and damage allies instead of healing them.

debuffs.name: Mania
debuffs.description: Creatures with Mania take damage at the end of their turn equal to 3% of the health all creatures had recovered when this debuff was applied.

debuffs.name: Poisoned
debuffs.description: Creatures with Poisoned take damage based on the inflictor's Attack each turn.

debuffs.name: Scorned
debuffs.description: Scorned creatures cannot Attack; resistant creatures can still attack at -50% damage.

debuffs.name: Silenced
debuffs.description: Silenced creatures cannot Cast spells; resistant creatures can still cast at -50% damage.

debuffs.name: Sleeping
debuffs.description: Sleeping creatures cannot act until they take damage or the debuff expires.

debuffs.name: Snared
debuffs.description: Snared creatures are stuck at the bottom of the timeline until they break free (chance each turn).

debuffs.name: Stone
debuffs.description: Creatures with Stone cannot dodge or deal critical damage.

debuffs.name: Vulnerable
debuffs.description: Vulnerable creatures take 50% more damage.

debuffs.name: Weak
debuffs.description: Weak creatures deal 50% less damage.
